goal: 记录 PR18 外部提交候选验证

summary.title: 记录 PR18 外部提交候选验证
summary.what: 更新 external release submission packet，记录 PR #18 pre-merge submission candidate 的 source commit、artifact SHA、handoff manifest 摘要、packaged files 与 artifact-level smoke 通过结果。
summary.why: 当前 repo-side cutover gate 已绿，下一步是外部提交或 real-profile UAT；把当前候选包证据写回 packet，可以让后续 merge/release 决策者直接复核 artifact，而不是依赖聊天记录。
summary.user_goal: 记录 PR18 外部提交候选验证

decisions.point: 是否把 PR #18 candidate 当作最终外部上传记录
decisions.chose: 记录为 pre-merge PR candidate，并明确 PR #18 落地后需要从 accepted release branch 重新 prepare
decisions.rationale: 当前权限边界不允许 merge 或外部提交；candidate evidence 有用，但不能替代最终从 accepted release source 生成的 upload bundle。
rejected: 把候选包写成最终提交结果
为避免更新文档而只把 artifact 证据留在聊天里

review_notes: Incremental code delta for this intent is docs/external-release-submission-packet-2026-05-27.md in commit 4a0e921.
seal --prepare reports the full PR branch diff because this documentation update is on the existing Agent Run UI PR branch.

Validation: git diff --check passed; release:cutover:status command checks passed but returned nonzero before push only because the branch was ahead of upstream; artifact-level smoke had already passed against the generated zip.

behavioral_changes: External release packet now points at the PR #18 candidate artifact evidence and includes an explicit pre-merge boundary.
